title: Internal Pivot with Chisel
description: Setup and use Chisel for internal pivoting to access an internal subnet via SOCKS proxy.

commands.title: Start Chisel Server on Attacker
commands.description: Start Chisel server in reverse mode with SOCKS5 proxy enabled on port 8000.

commands.title: Run Chisel Client on Target
commands.description: Connect the Chisel client from the target to the attacker. Replace {fingerprint} with server fingerprint and {attacker_ip} with your attack machine IP.

commands.title: Configure Proxychains to use SOCKS5 Proxy
commands.description: Add SOCKS5 proxy at localhost port 1080 (default chisel server SOCKS port) to proxychains configuration.

commands.title: Use Proxychains with Nmap or Other Tools
commands.description: Run Nmap scan through the SOCKS5 proxy to scan internal subnet 10.0.52.0/24.

notes: Make sure to replace {fingerprint} with the actual server fingerprint shown when you start the chisel server.
Ensure the target can reach the attacker's IP and port 8000.
Proxychains is used to route traffic through the chisel SOCKS5 proxy to reach internal network resources.
